title: TNEA 2026 Registration Crosses 2 Lakh Applications
summary: The registration for TNEA engineering counselling has seen record turnout this year with over 2,10,000 registered students.

title: Online Certificate Verification Process Extended till June 22
summary: DoTE has extended the deadline for online certificate verification by two days to facilitate students waiting for revaluation results.

title: New Emerging Branches Added to Anna University Curriculum
summary: Anna University introduces specialized B.Tech. courses in VLSI Design, Electric Vehicles, and Cybersecurity in several top colleges this year.

title: 7.5% Government School Reservation Verification Guide
summary: A detailed step-by-step checklist for government school students claiming the 7.5% free seat reservation during certificate verification.
